tours.name: Kharkhorin – Orkhon Waterfall – Elsen Tasarkhai – Ulaanbaatar
tours.highlight: Ancient Mongolian history combined with the beautiful landscapes of Central Mongolia. Optional horse trekking experience available.

days.title: Kharkhorin (Karakorum)
days.description: Drive to Kharkhorin, the ancient capital of the Mongol Empire during the 13th century. Visit Erdene  Zuu Monastery, the oldest surviving Buddhist monastery in Mongolia, surrounded by ancient stone walls and stupas.Once the capital of the Great Mongol Empire, Kharkhorin is one of Mongolia’s most important historical sites. Visitors will explore the ruins of the ancient city and learn about the era of Chinggis Khan and his successors. Overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower.
days.overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower

days.title: Orkhon Waterfall (UNESCO Site)
days.description: Continue driving to the Orkhon Valley, a UNESCO World Heritage Site recognized for its outstanding cultural landscape and long history of nomadic civilization. Visit the Orkhon Waterfall, created by ancient volcanic eruptions and lava flows thousands of years ago. Enjoy a leisurely walk along the Orkhon River, surrounded by wide grasslands and dramatic basalt cliffs. The surrounding valley offers beautiful scenery and is ideal for walking and photography
days.overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower

days.title: Elsen Tasarkhai (Mini Gobi)
days.description: Known as the “Mini Gobi,” this area features sand dunes surrounded by grassy steppe and rocky hills. Visitors can walk on the dunes and experience a unique mix of desert and steppe landscapes. This unique area showcases an unusual combination of golden sand dunes, green grasslands, and forested hills in one location. You will have time to walk on the dunes, enjoy the vast open scenery, and experience a camel ride led by local nomadic herders. Overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower. Optional: Add one extra day for a horse trekking experience with local nomadic families.
days.optional: Add one extra day for horse trekking
days.overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower

days.title: Return to Ulaanbaatar
days.description: Arrival in the city in the late afternoon. Upon arrival, have a farewell dinner together then check in at the hotel and enjoy free time. The following morning, you will be transferred to the airport for your departure. End of the tour.

tours.name: Baga Gazriin Chuluu – Tsagaan Suvarga – Ar Burd Sand Dunes – Ulaanbaatar
tours.highlight: Dramatic granite formations, colorful cliffs, and classic Gobi Desert landscapes.

days.title: Baga Gazriin Chuluu (Middle Gobi)
days.description: Sart the trip to Baga Gazriin Chuluu, a stunning granite rock formation that rises dramatically from the expansive steppes. Here, you can wander through narrow rock passages, discover scenic viewpoints, and explore the remnants of history hidden among the rocks. Overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower.
days.overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower

days.title: Tsagaan Suvarga (White Stupa)
days.description: to Tsagaan Suvarga, a spectacular escarpment formed by wind and water erosion. Its colorful layered cliffs resemble the ruins of an ancient city and offer breathtaking views, especially at sunset. Tsagaan Suvarga (White Stupa) is a dramatic multi-colored cliff formation and geological site in the Gobi Desert of Mongolia. The name, which means White Stupa, comes from the cliffs' appearance, which resembles the ruins of an ancient city or Buddhist stupas from a distance. Once the floor of an ancient ocean, the escarpment is composed of sedimentary rock, primarily layers of clay and limestone, that built up over millions of years. Wind and water erosion have shaped the cliffs into their current form, exposing vivid layers of white, yellow, purple, orange, and red rock.The cliffs stretch for about 400 meters (1,312 feet) in length and reach a height of up to 60 meters (197 feet).

days.title: Ar Burd Sand Dunes
days.description: A peaceful sand dune area offering wide desert views and a quiet atmosphere, perfect for short walks and enjoying the Gobi scenery.

days.title: Return to Ulaanbaatar
days.description: Late afternoon come to UB, upon arrival, have a farewell dinner together then check in at the hotel and enjoy free time. The following morning, you will be transferred to the airport for your departure. End of the tour.

tours.name: Elsen Tasarkhai – Kharkhorin – Ugii Lake – Ulaanbaatar
tours.highlight: A balanced journey combining desert scenery, historical heritage, and a peaceful freshwater lake.

days.title: Elsen Tasarkhai (Mini Gobi)
days.description: After breakfast, drive west from Ulaanbaatar to Elsen Tasarkhai, commonly known as the “Mini Gobi.” This unique area showcases an unusual combination of golden sand dunes, green grasslands, and forested hills in one location. You will have time to walk on the dunes, enjoy the vast open scenery, and experience a camel ride led by local nomadic herders. Overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower.
days.overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower

days.title: Kharkhorin (Karakorum)
days.description: Drive to Kharkhorin, the ancient capital of the Mongol Empire during the 13th century. Visit Erdene  Zuu Monastery, the oldest surviving Buddhist monastery in Mongolia, surrounded by ancient stone walls and stupas. Explore the remains of Karakorum and learn about the history of Genghis Khan and the Mongol Empire. Overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower.
days.overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower

days.title: Ugii Lake – Return to Ulaanbaatar
days.description: A freshwater lake known for its birdlife and peaceful surroundings. It is an ideal place for relaxation and enjoying nature. Late afternoon come to UB, upon arrival, have a farewell dinner together then check in at the hotel and enjoy free time. The following morning, you will be transferred to the airport for your departure. End of the tour.

tours.name: Terelj & Chinggis Khan Statue – Baga Gazriin Chuluu – Ar Burd Sand Dunes – Ulaanbaatar
tours.highlight: National parks, famous landmarks, and desert landscapes close to Ulaanbaatar.

days.title: Chinggis Khan Statue & Terelj National Park
days.description: After breakfast star your travel to the Majestic Chinggis Khaan Equestrian Statue, an impressive monument standing 40 meters tall. This iconic statue honors the legendary Mongolian leader, offering panoramic views of the surrounding steppe. To see the eagles and taking photos with an eagle on your arm. After soaking in the historical significance, travel to Terelj National Park, known for its breathtaking granite rock formations, lush green meadows, and tranquil rivers. Experience the serenity of nature in this breathtaking landscape. Overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower.
days.overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower

days.title: Baga Gazriin Chuluu
days.description: Venture to Baga Gazriin Chuluu, an impressive granite rock formation rising from the steppe, creating a dramatic landscape that invites exploration. Arrive at a family-run ger camp to unwind amidst the serene surroundings, soaking in the natural beauty that envelops you. Discover the ruins of a hidden 17th-century monastery, explore unique rock formations, and visit a natural spring known for its crystal-clear water. This day is all about connecting with nature and recharging your spirit in this enchanting landscape. Overnight: At ger camp (proper toilet and hot shower.
days.overnight: Local ger camp with proper toilet and hot shower

days.title: Ar Burd Sand Dunes
days.description: EnjA peaceful sand dune area offering wide desert views and a quiet atmosphere, perfect for short walks and enjoying the Gobi scenery.

days.title: Return to Ulaanbaatar
days.description: Late afternoon come to UB, upon arrival, have a farewell dinner together then check in at the hotel and enjoy free time. The following morning, you will be transferred to the airport for your departure. End of the tour.
